tools.name: get_project_overview
tools.title: Get project overview
tools.description: Return an overview of the Venus Grounds 2 luxury residential project: location, developer, residence types, and enquiry channel.

tools.name: get_site_content
tools.title: Get site content
tools.description: Fetch a piece of publicly editable site content (hero copy, sections, etc.) by its key. Returns the raw JSON value stored for that key.

key.description: The content key to fetch, e.g. 'hero', 'about', 'contact'.
